## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated as needed; `pytest` (or `pytest -m "not e2e"`) passes.
- [ ] Code formatted with Black and isort (`black src/ tests/` and `isort src/ tests/`).
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behaviour or setup changed.
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff.
